description: Create evidence matrix visualization for irg-1 molecular function ND annotation evaluation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.size'] = 9

# Create the evidence matrix as a structured table figure
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 10))
ax.axis('off')

# Evidence data
headers = ['Citation', 'Evidence Type', 'Direction', 'Claim', 'Key Finding', 'Context', 'Confidence']

data = [
    ['PMID:20133860
Estes et al. 2010', 'Mutant pheno.
+ expression', 'Supports
ND', 'irg-1 is immune
response marker', 'irg-1::GFP reporter induced
by PA14; zip-2 required', 'C. elegans
intestine', 'High
(direct)'],
    ['PMID:22520465
Dunbar et al. 2012', 'Expression
pattern', 'Supports
ND', 'irg-1 responds to
translation inhibition', 'zip-2/irg-1 pathway activated
by translational block', 'C. elegans
intestine', 'High
(direct)'],
    ['PMID:37390817
Schuller et al. 2023', 'Direct assay
(ortholog)', 'Qualifies
ND', 'NADAR = guanine
de-ADP-ribosylase', 'Activity conserved in
eukaryotic NADAR proteins', 'In vitro
bacterial+euk.', 'Medium
(not irg-1)'],
    ['PMID:25431972
Frelin et al. 2015', 'Direct assay
(ortholog)', 'Qualifies
ND', 'NADAR = N-glycosidase
(riboflavin intermed.)', 'YbiA cleaves N-glycosidic
bond; EC 3.2.2.-', 'E. coli
in vitro', 'Medium
(not irg-1)'],
    ['PMID:40929802
Yang et al. 2025', 'RNAi + survival
assay', 'Qualifies
ND', 'Insect NADAR genes
in immune defense', 'CmNADAR1/2 RNAi reduces
survival; intestinal necrosis', 'Beetle
intestine', 'Medium
(diff. species)'],
    ['PMID:22399070
de Souza & Aravind 2012', 'Computational
prediction', 'Qualifies
ND', 'NADAR acts on
ADP-ribose derivatives', 'Predicted involvement in
NAD-utilizing pathways', 'Bioinformatic
analysis', 'Low
(prediction)'],
    ['UniProt O16327
Swiss-Prot', 'Database
review', 'Supports
ND', 'No catalytic activity
annotated for irg-1', 'No EC number; annotation
score 2.0 (low)', 'C. elegans
irg-1', 'High
(curated)'],
    ['WormBase
WBGene00015574', 'Database
phenotype', 'Supports
ND', 'No loss-of-function
phenotype', '12 phenotypes NOT observed;
0 phenotypes observed', 'C. elegans
irg-1', 'Medium
(neg. data)'],
]

# Create table
table = ax.table(cellText=data, colLabels=headers, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(7.5)
table.scale(1.0, 2.2)

# Style header
for j in range(len(headers)):
    cell = table[0, j]
    cell.set_facecolor('#2C3E50')
    cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold', fontsize=8)

# Color rows by direction
direction_colors = {
    'Supports
ND': '#E8F8F5',       # light green
    'Qualifies
ND': '#FEF9E7',      # light yellow
    'Refutes
ND': '#FDEDEC',        # light red
}

for i in range(len(data)):
    direction = data[i][2]
    color = direction_colors.get(direction, 'white')
    for j in range(len(headers)):
        table[i+1, j].set_facecolor(color)

plt.title('Evidence Matrix: irg-1 (C. elegans) Molecular Function ND Annotation
', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_matrix.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence matrix saved.")
